  • exp_specs module

exp_specs module

Experiment specifications: frequency bands, beams, white noise levels, and atmospheric (one-over-f) noise parameters for the supported experiment configurations (e.g. S4-Wide, S4-Ultra deep).

exp_specs.get_exp_specs(expname, corr_noise_for_spt=1, remove_atm=0)
